title: Role validation lives only in patch path, not in space creation
description: apply_member_patch validates roles ('admin'|'moderator'|'member') before persisting, but if space_set has a creation-time member-insertion path (e.g. initial members in the create payload), that path calls the store directly without role validation. A contributor adding a new member-insertion call site would see apply_member_patch as the pattern and might copy it correctly, but there is no comment at the store layer or upsert_space_member_with_role signature indicating that role validation is the caller's responsibility. What would make it clear: a doc comment on upsert_space_member_with_role asserting the role precondition, or an assertion/debug_assert in the store function itself.
close_reason: Added precondition doc comment to upsert_space_member_with_role in store.rs naming apply_member_patch as the canonical validation site.
